text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Good morning! And thank you for the day off!
choice_data_list: Looks like you made it count.
Looks like you made it count.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I sure did! I got to tell Mom and Dad all about
you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm fully charged and ready to go. Let's get
to work!
